raw_consumer_statement:
I had a XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX credit card that was recently transferred to Barclays. Before the transfer, my account had unauthorized transactions that caused my balance to go negative by about {$14000.00}.

Since the transfer, Barclays refuses to let me file chargebacks or fraud disputes, saying the charges happened when XXXX still managed the account. XXXX also refuses to help, saying they no longer own or service the account.

As a result, I have unauthorized charges that I can not dispute with either bank, leaving me with a large fraudulent balance.

I also requested for financial hardship from Barclays after realizing that I wont be able to make disputes on the fraudulent transactions and was not approved after applying twice and contacting support.
